_meta.source: LHDN, BSH, EPF, MOF, MOH, KPWKM official portals
_meta.note: Static curated data. Updated via cron when policy changes detected.

str.name: Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah (STR)
str.description: Cash aid for eligible B40 and M40 households
how_to_apply: Update bank details via MyTax portal
Check status via MyTax or STR hotline 1-800-88-2727

bsh.name: Bantuan Sara Hidup (BSH)
bsh.description: Household living cost assistance (predecessor to STR, now merged)
bsh.note: BSH has been replaced by Sumbangan Tunai Rahmah (STR)

epf_isaraan.name: EPF i-Saraan
epf_isaraan.description: Voluntary contributions for self-employed and gig workers

contribution.government_match: Up to RM300/year (15% match on first RM2,000 contributed)

eligibility: Self-employed, gig worker, or informal sector worker
Not an EPF member with employer contributions
how_to_apply: Register via i-Akaun (EPF app) or EPF counter

epf_isuri.name: EPF i-Suri
eligibility: Husband is an active EPF member
Wife is not an active EPF member

fuel_subsidy.name: Fuel Subsidy & Price Control Mechanism
fuel_subsidy.description: Government fuel subsidy system covering RON95, diesel, and LPG

subsidy_allocation_by_group.households: Fuel subsidy cost ~RM4 billion/year for B40 households
subsidy_allocation_by_group.fishermen: Allocated ~200 litres/month at subsidised diesel rate
subsidy_allocation_by_group.public_transport: Fleet card system for buses and taxis

fuel_subsidy.note: RON95 targeted subsidy implementation is a key government reform, expected to save ~RM4 billion/year

reliefs.amount: Up to RM4,000 (life insurance + EPF combined)

programs.name: Bantuan Awal Persekolahan (BAP)
programs.eligibility: Primary & Secondary school students from households earning ≤ RM8,000
programs.description: One-off assistance of RM150 to help prepare school supplies for school-going children.

programs.name: PTPTN (Higher Education Loan)
programs.eligibility: Malaysian students accepted into accredited diploma/degree courses
programs.description: Low-interest study financing for tertiary students at public and private colleges/universities.

programs.name: JPA Program Khas Scholarship
programs.eligibility: Top SPM/STPM scorers in various critical fields
programs.description: Federal government scholarship program for outstanding students pursuing local or overseas degrees.

programs.name: MARA Education Loans & Sponsorship
programs.eligibility: Bumiputera students studying STEM, technical, and business fields
programs.description: Study sponsorship with convertible loan options (up to 90% discount based on academic performance).

programs.name: Bank Negara Malaysia Scholarship
programs.eligibility: Top scorers majoring in Economics, Finance, Actuarial Science, Law, and IT
programs.description: Prestigious scholarships for undergraduate and postgraduate studies at top universities.

programs.name: HRD Corp Training Grants
programs.eligibility: Malaysian employees of registered levy-paying companies
programs.description: Funding and subsidies to help workers upskill and obtain professional certifications.

programs.name: PeKa B40
programs.eligibility: STR recipients and spouses aged 40 and above

programs.name: Talian Kasih
programs.eligibility: All individuals in distress or domestic crisis

business.name: SME & Business Grants
business.description: Financial grants and micro-financing for SMEs and startups

programs.name: SME Digitalisation Grant
programs.description: 50% matching grant up to RM5,000 to help micro-businesses and SMEs adopt digital tools.

programs.name: TERAJU Superb Grant
programs.description: Grants for Bumiputera startups to launch tech-enabled innovative products.

programs.name: TEKUN Niaga Financing
programs.description: Fast micro-financing for small traders and micro-entrepreneurs.

budi_madani.name: BUDI Madani (Diesel Subsidy)
budi_madani.description: Targeted diesel subsidy for eligible individuals and farmers

programs.name: BUDI Individu
eligibility: Own a diesel vehicle registered under personal name (non-luxury, <2,000cc)
Additional 100 litres/month (total 300L) eligible for pickup/jeep owners
how_to_apply: Register/Verify status via BUDI Madani portal: https://budimadani.gov.my
Link MyKad for instant verification at the pump
programs.payment_method: Verified via MyKad at petrol stations

programs.name: BUDI Agrikomoditi
eligibility: Active smallholder registered with relevant agency
how_to_apply: Register via BUDI Madani portal: https://budimadani.gov.my
Link MyKad for instant verification at the pump

programs.name: Subsidised Diesel Control System (SKDS) Fleet Card
eligibility: Public transport vehicles, school buses, and taxis (SKDS 1.0)
how_to_apply: Apply via KPDN MySubsidi portal: https://mysubsidi.kpdn.gov.my
Select participating oil companies to issue fleet cards

budi_madani.note: Overseas diesel companies and foreign vehicle owners not eligible

ewallet_credit.name: RM100 e-Wallet Credit (STR Top-Up)
ewallet_credit.description: One-time RM100 e-wallet credit for all eligible STR recipients

details.distribution: Via e-wallet platforms (Touch 'n Go, GrabPay, ShopeePay, etc.)
usage: Online purchases at over 1 million merchant outlets

how_to_apply: New applicants must register via MyTax at https://mytax.hasil.gov.my

fuel_quota.name: RON95 Targeted Subsidy System
fuel_quota.description: Subsidised RON95 fuel pricing at the pump via MyKad verification.

details.subsidy_system: Targeted pricing via MyKad verification at the pump terminal
eligibility_rules: Malaysian citizen holding a valid driving licence
Entitled to a flexible monthly quota of 200 litres (shared with Diesel under BUDI95)
Excludes top 15% high-income class (T15) and foreign nationals
Usage beyond the 200-litre monthly limit is charged at the floated market price
eligible_vehicles: All private vehicles registered to eligible citizens
Excludes luxury vehicles registered under high-income (T15) criteria
how_it_works: Present MyKad or scan at the petrol station pump terminal
Real-time eligibility check via PADU centralized database

fuel_quota.note: Implementation starting in phases across Malaysia.

customs.name: Customs Duty Relief
customs.description: Duty exemptions for specific imports and personal belongings

sara.name: Sumbangan Asas Rahmah (SARA)
sara.description: Cashless food aid for basic groceries

usage: Purchase basic necessities at participating retailers
Cashless payment via MyKad or e-wallet
